info.title: Shake API
info.description:
REST API for the **node catalog** (toolbox definitions) and **board graph** (runtime nodes, connections, props).

Entity IDs are `bigint` in PostgreSQL and serialized as **strings** in JSON.

tags.name: Boards
tags.description: Board library and board-scoped paginated lists (`/boards`, `/boards/:boardId/nodes|connections|props`)

tags.name: Board - nodes
tags.description: Place and manage nodes on boards (`/board-nodes` CRUD)

tags.name: Board - connections
tags.description: Edges between board node sockets (`/board-node-connections` CRUD)

tags.name: Board - node props
tags.description: Runtime property values on board nodes (`/board-node-props` CRUD)

tags.name: Catalog - nodes
tags.description: Logical node types / toolbox entries (`GET /catalog-nodes` paginated)

tags.name: Catalog - node versions
tags.description: Immutable versions per node type (nested list + `/catalog-node-versions` CRUD)

tags.name: Catalog - node sockets
tags.description: Input/output port definitions on a version (nested list + CRUD)

tags.name: Catalog - node properties
tags.description: Property schemas on a version (nested list + CRUD)

tags.name: Catalog - socket rules
tags.description: Allowed socket pairs on a version (nested list + CRUD)

deprecatedAt.description: When set, version is treated as deprecated in the toolbox
When set, version is treated as deprecated in the toolbox

limit.description: Max connections allowed to this socket (null = unlimited)
Max connections allowed to this socket (null = unlimited)

payload.description: Published board document payload (nodes, connections, tree)

catalogNodeVersionId.description: Pinned catalog version; FK to catalog_node_versions.id

value.description: Optional runtime value on the placed node

catalogNodeVersionId.description: Pinned catalog version; FK to catalog_node_versions.id

value.description: Optional runtime value on the placed node
JSON value per catalog property type
JSON value per catalog property type
